caption: A screen recording shows a web browser window displaying a complex network map with various nodes and connections on a dark background. A small, floating video window in the upper right corner features a man wearing a black headset and a dark shirt, while another smaller video inset shows people in a room with tables and chairs. Legible on-screen text includes browser tabs such as "Trust & Learning by Systemdyni", "Future of Society by Systemdyni", and "Insights > Introduction > Kumu". In the network map, several nodes are highlighted, including one labeled "Equity" and another with "Equity Blocking" written in green text below it. As the sequence progresses, the man in the upper right video window disappears, and then reappears in the final frame, continuing to look toward the camera. The overall layout of the network map and the inset video of the room remain static throughout the recording.
